context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct scraping library (playwright/chromium), implements the parsePriceCents helper correctly, filters stale competitor data, uses the correct cron schedule pattern and timezone, structures the price_history table schema correctly, and applies price changes inside a database transaction while also updating the search index.

checklist.name: Uses playwright chromium
checklist.description: The competitor monitor imports from 'playwright' and uses chromium.launch() — NOT puppeteer, selenium, or any other browser automation library

checklist.name: Headless browser mode
checklist.description: chromium.launch() is called with { headless: true }

checklist.name: Page navigation timeout
checklist.description: page.goto() is called with a timeout of exactly 15000 milliseconds

checklist.name: parsePriceCents: strips currency symbols
checklist.description: The price parsing function removes dollar signs and commas (via replace or similar) before extracting the numeric value

checklist.name: parsePriceCents: converts to integer cents
checklist.description: The price parsing function multiplies the parsed float by 100 and rounds to an integer (not stored as dollars or float cents)

checklist.name: Staleness filter: 4-hour cutoff
checklist.description: Competitor prices with a fetchedAt timestamp older than 4 hours are excluded from the returned results

checklist.name: Cron pattern: every 30 minutes during business hours
checklist.description: The cron expression '*/30 6-22 * * *' (or functionally equivalent) is used for the pricing job schedule

checklist.name: Cron timezone: America/New_York
checklist.description: The cron job is configured with timezone 'America/New_York'

checklist.name: price_history table: correct field types
checklist.description: The price_history SQL table has old_price and new_price as INTEGER type (not DECIMAL or FLOAT), and changed_at as TIMESTAMPTZ

checklist.name: price_history table: audit fields
checklist.description: The price_history table includes a reason column (TEXT) and a changed_by column with a default value identifying the pricing engine

checklist.name: price_history index
checklist.description: An index is created on price_history for (product_id, changed_at DESC) to support efficient per-product history lookups

checklist.name: Price change in transaction
checklist.description: The price history data-access function wraps both the product price update AND the price_history insert inside a single database transaction

checklist.name: Search index update after transaction
checklist.description: After recording the price change, the code also updates the search index (e.g. calls a searchIndex.updatePrice or equivalent) in the same applyPriceChange flow
